summary: Iteration 200 Linguistic & Phonics Integration testing complete. Fixed critical MongoDB WriteError bug in POST /api/mastery/progress (conflict between $inc and $setOnInsert). All 18 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: /theory route loads with 4 tabs (Circle of Fifths, Practice, Phonics, Voice), Phonics tab shows 5 vowel cards (A, E, I, O, U) with formant frequencies, vowel Chladni canvas, and phonics mic toggle. Escrow system for linguistic assets works with Tier 1 mastery requirement.
critical_code_review_comments: mastery.py: Fixed MongoDB WriteError by separating document creation from update operations - FIXED
mastery.py: POST /api/mastery/progress now correctly handles $inc operations without $setOnInsert conflicts - PASS
trade_circle.py: Renamed duplicate /trade-circle/escrow/create to /trade-circle/escrow/linguistic/create to avoid route conflicts - FIXED
MusicTheory.js: Phonics tab with 5 vowel cards (A, E, I, O, U) with data-testid='vowel-card-{vowel}' - PASS
MusicTheory.js: VowelChladniCanvas component renders formant-based Chladni patterns - PASS
MusicTheory.js: Phonics mic toggle (data-testid='phonics-mic-toggle') present - PASS
MusicTheory.js: Vowel Chladni canvas (data-testid='vowel-chladni-canvas') present - PASS
MusicTheory.js: Mastery tier banner (data-testid='mastery-tier-banner') renders when user has mastery data - PASS
MusicTheory.js: All 4 tabs (theory, practice, phonics, voice) have correct data-testid attributes - PASS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 200 Linguistic & Phonics Integration fully working. (1) Mastery system: GET /api/mastery/vowel-reference returns 5 vowels with formant data and 3 tier definitions. GET /api/mastery/tier returns user progress. POST /api/mastery/progress records vowel/frequency/practice_time mastery. GET /api/mastery/lessons returns 3 lessons. (2) Linguistic escrow: POST /api/trade-circle/escrow/linguistic/create creates escrow for phonetic_mantra or vocal_signature (requires Tier 1). POST /api/trade-circle/escrow/{id}/verify with accuracy>=85 completes trade. GET /api/trade-circle/escrows returns user's escrow history. (3) Linguistic listings: POST /api/trade-circle/listings/linguistic creates listing (requires Tier 1). (4) Frontend: /theory route has 4 tabs (data-testid='tab-theory', 'tab-practice', 'tab-phonics', 'tab-voice'). Phonics tab shows 5 vowel cards (data-testid='vowel-card-A' etc.), vowel Chladni canvas (data-testid='vowel-chladni-canvas'), phonics mic toggle (data-testid='phonics-mic-toggle'), and mastery tier banner (data-testid='mastery-tier-banner' when logged in with mastery data). (5) Bug fixed: MongoDB WriteError in POST /api/mastery/progress due to $inc/$setOnInsert conflict - resolved by separating document creation from update.

mastery_system.GET /api/mastery/vowel-reference: Returns 5 vowels (A, E, I, O, U) with f1/f2 formants, 3 tier definitions, Tesla frequencies
mastery_system.GET /api/mastery/tier: Returns user's current_tier, vowels_mastered, frequencies_mastered, bloom_count

linguistic_escrow.POST /api/trade-circle/escrow/linguistic: Creates escrow for phonetic_mantra or vocal_signature (requires Tier 1)
linguistic_escrow.POST /api/trade-circle/escrow/{id}/verif: Verifies resonance match, completes trade if accuracy >= 85

phonics_tab.vowel_cards: 5 cards (A, E, I, O, U) with data-testid='vowel-card-{vowel}'
phonics_tab.mastery_tier_banner: data-testid='mastery-tier-banner' (visible when logged in with mastery data)

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB WriteError: Updating the path 'total_practice_seconds' would create a conflict at 'total_practice_seconds'
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Using $inc with $setOnInsert on the same fields (total_practice_seconds, bloom_count) in a single update operation
bugs_fixed.fix: Separated document creation from update - first check if document exists, insert if not, then update separately

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Two functions with same route path - one for physical-digital escrow (line 694) and one for linguistic escrow (line 1005)
bugs_fixed.fix: Renamed linguistic escrow endpoint to POST /trade-circle/escrow/linguistic/create
